summary: All gates green. Branch is rebased on smithering/integration (tip 9e041f5, feature HEAD 4d586b7). tsc --noEmit clean. credentials.test.ts: 10 pass 0 fail. secret-scan.e2e.ts: 1 pass 0 fail. Full suite: 54 pass 0 fail across 11 files. RBG confirmed: SEC-1-rbg-red.log (97 lines) shows genuine failures for 4 distinct adversarial cases (non-canonical env guard, multi-segment token, trace identifier redaction, whole-session planted leak) with real error output and red_exit_*=1 markers; SEC-1-green.log shows 11 pass 0 fail across 2 files, matching independent re-run results. Both declared evidence paths resolve to non-empty files.
